raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu eﬅi pretti teem Lee-
zibu dewis/ ka teem bij atgree-
ſtees pee tawas Bauflibas. Bet
 tee turrejah̄ lepni/ un ne klaun-
fija taweem Baufsceem/un greh-
koja prett tawahm Teefabm /
(prett tahm/ zaur ko Zilweks tah̄
Darriſdans dſihwo)/ un tee irr fa-
wu Kameſi nogreesutſchi/un pahr-
galwigi tappuschi / un ne klaun-
fijſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu eﬅi dauds Gaddus
uh̄s teem gaidiſs/ un pretti teem
zaur tawu Garra leezinajis/
eekſch taweem Prawefscheem;
Bet tee ne atgreeſe jawas Autis.
Tapehz eﬅi tu tohs nodewis to
Lanshu Rohkâ/ eekſch tahm
Semmehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr pehz tawahm
leelahm Apschehloſchanahm ne
eﬅi tu tohs wiſſai tsnihzinajs/
neds tohs afstahjis/ Jo tu eﬅi
weens ſchehligs un Sirdsscheh-
ligs Deewṣ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu muhſu Deewṣ/ tu
STIPRAIS/ tu leels/ tu
warrens / un tu bihjajams tu pahr nmms eﬅi eezeblis
DEEWS/ kas tu Derribu un
Sirdsschehlaſtibu turri;
 turri wiſſu ſcho Grubtibu par
masu tawā Breekſchā / kas
nmms irr uhsgubjuti/ muhſeem
Rehnineem / muhſeem Leeleem-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomehr tu eﬅi tai
eekſch wiſſa/ kas mums uhsg-
jis irraid / jo tu eﬅi uheſtiz-
darrijs; Bet mehs eſtam bes-
wigi darriſtchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir muhſu Rehnini/ in
tu Leel-Kungi/ muhſu Preeft-
un muhſu Tehwi ne irr ta-
Bauflibu turrejſcht/ un ne
wehra jehmuſchi tawas Paw-
lefchanas/ un tawas Leezibas/
tu pretti teem leezinaji.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee ne trr tew katp-
schi jawā Rehninu Walsſibā/
par dauds tawu leeclu Labbum
ko tu teem dewis eﬅi / un
plattā un treknuā Semmē/ ko
preektch winneem eﬅi notizzi
un tee ne irr atgreeſufchees
jaweem fauneem Darbeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ mehs eſtam fe-
deem Kalpi/ ir tai Semmē/ ko
muhſeem Tehveem dewis eſ-
winnas Auglus un win-
Labbumn ehſt; Raugt/ eek-
tahs eſtam mehs tawi Kalpi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu watro jawus Au-
kuß preektch teem Rehnineem/
Ne da pahr muhſahm Meefahm
un pahr muhſeem Lohpeem/ pe-
jawas Labpatiſschanas: Ta e-
ſim mehs leeclas Behdas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un eekſch ta wiſſa darra-
meb
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
